batch_planning.why: Ranked top planner for instruction adherence, with fast and high-context fallbacks.

batch_prose.why: Instruction-first prose routing improves strict scene-plan adherence, with Trinity and GLM as creative fallbacks.

batch_editing.why: Instruction-heavy editing and stitching prioritizes deterministic multi-thread merge behavior with strong fallback coverage.

repair_json.why: JSON repair prioritizes strict format compliance and deterministic structured output behavior.

coherence_check.why: Reasoning-first coherence checker with fallback validators for continuity enforcement.
